forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgot.sent: Email sent! If that address is linked to an account, you'll receive a reset link shortly. Check your spam folder too.

reset.invalidSubtitle: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.doneMessage: Your password was changed successfully. You'll be redirected to sign in shortly…
reset.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

verify.title: Email confirmation
verify.doneMessage: Thanks — your address is confirmed. You can now receive the monthly summary and use Couple Mode.
verify.errorHint: Open the app and request a new confirmation email from the banner at the top.
verify.invalidSubtitle: This confirmation link is incomplete. Open the link exactly as it appears in the email.

demo.error: Couldn't open the demo. Please try again.

legal.consent: By creating an account, you accept the <1>Privacy Policy</1>.
